title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
